zh.lifeSummary: 當Ismay Dillon於大約1510年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯時，她的父親Bartholemew Dillon33歲，母親Elizabeth Barnewall29歲。她於1527年與Sir James Fleming在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯斯藍結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1591年11月9日在愛爾蘭庫迪 盧斯登達爾可享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ismay Dillon于大约1510年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯时，她的父亲Bartholemew Dillon33岁，母亲Elizabeth Barnewall29岁。她于1527年与Sir James Fleming在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯斯藍结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1591年11月9日在爱尔兰庫迪 盧斯登達爾可享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dillon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Irish, and French: from the Norman French personal name Dillon, arising from the ancient Germanic Dillo (of uncertain origin, perhaps a byname from the root dil- ‘destroy’).
English: habitational name from Dilwyn in Herefordshire, recorded in 1138 as Dilun, probably from Old English dīglum, dative plural of dīgle ‘settlement at the shady or secret places’.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duilleáin ‘descendant of Duilleán’, a personal name, a variant of Dallán meaning ‘little blind one’.

variants.name: Delon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Michel.
French: from a short form of the personal name Adelon, from ancient Germanic Adelo, a pet form of compound names formed with the element adel ‘noble’.

variants.name: Dillion
meanings: Irish and English: possibly a variant of   Dillon  .

variants.name: Dillow
meanings: English: habitational name from Dilwyn in Herefordshire, recorded as Delewe in 1295 and Dylewe in 1334. Compare Dillon 2.

nameMeanings.name: Ismay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cumberland and Northumberland): from the Middle English female personal name Isemay, possibly from an unrecorded ancient Germanic Ismagin, perhaps from īs ‘ice’ or īsen- ‘iron’ + magin- ‘strength’, though -magin is not known as a second element. Compare Esmay .

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.

en.lifeSummary: When Ismay Dillon was born about 1510, in County Meath, Ireland, her father, Bartholemew Dillon, was 33 and her mother, Elizabeth Barnewall, was 29. She married Sir James Fleming in 1527, in Slane, County Meath, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 9 November 1591, in Dundalk, County Louth, Ireland, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ismay Dillon est née environ 1510, à County Meath, Irlande, son père, Bartholemew Dillon, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Barnewall, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir James Fleming en 1527, à Slane, County Meath, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 9 novembre 1591, à Dundalk, County Louth, Irlande, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ismay Dillon um 1510 in County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bartholemew Dillon 33 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Barnewall 29. Sie hat 1527 in Slane, County Meath, Irland Sir James Fleming geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 9. November 1591 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Dundalk, County Louth, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ismay Dillon è nata il circa 1510 nel County Meath, Irlanda, sua padre, Bartholemew Dillon, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Barnewall, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Sir James Fleming nel 1527, nel Slane, County Meath, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 9 novembre 1591, nel Dundalk, County Louth, Irlanda, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ismay Dillonが約1510年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスで生まれた時，父Bartholemew Dillonは33歳，母Elizabeth Barnewallは29歳であった。1527年にアイルランドコウントイ メアススランでSir James Flemingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1591年11月9日にアイルランドコウントイ ロウスダンダルクで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ismay Dillon(이)가 대략 1510년 아일랜드 카운티 미스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bartholemew Dillon(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Barnewall(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1527년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 슬랜에서 Sir James Fleming(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1591년 11월 9일 아일랜드 카운티 루스 던다크에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ismay Dillon nasceu aproximadamente 1510, em County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Bartholemew Dillon, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Barnewall, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir James Fleming em 1527, em Slane, County Meath, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 9 de novembro de 1591, em Dundalk, County Louth, Irlanda, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ismay Dillon родилась около 1510 г. в местности коунти мит, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Bartholemew Dillon было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Barnewall, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Fleming в 1527 г. в местности слан, коунти мит, Ирландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 9 ноября 1591 г. в местности дундалк, коунти лоут, Ирландия в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ismay Dillon nació aproximadamente 1510, en County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Bartholemew Dillon, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Barnewall, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Sir James Fleming en 1527, en Slane, County Meath, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 9 de noviembre de 1591, en Dundalk, County Louth, Irlanda, a la edad de 82 años.
